shorts.title: ​‘The Office US’ cast: Where the Dunder Mifflin folks are now​
shorts.title_distilled: ​‘The Office US’ cast: Where the Dunder Mifflin folks are now​.
shorts.description: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites. This mockumentary about the oddball staff at Dunder Mifflin in Scranton, Pennsylvania, first hit screens in 2005 and stuck around for nine seasons, wrapping up in 2…
shorts.content: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites. This mockumentary about the oddball staff at Dunder Mifflin in Scranton, Pennsylvania, first hit screens in 2005 and stuck around for nine seasons, wrapping up in 2…
shorts.content_distilled: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites.

shorts.title: Scranton crime spike dogs Dem mayor as she challenges GOP Rep in Biden’s hometown
shorts.title_distilled: Scranton crime spike dogs Dem mayor as she challenges GOP Rep in Biden’s hometown.
shorts.description: Crime crisis rocks Biden's hometown as Scranton mayor faces heat over reported gang violence while challenging GOP Rep. Rob Bresnahan in swing district.

shorts.title: NEPA's largest Flea market reopens in Dickson City
shorts.title_distilled: NEPA's largest Flea market reopens in Dickson City.
shorts.description: The flea market located at the Circle Drive-In has been open since the 1970's and is the largest flea market in Northeast Pennsylvania.
shorts.content: The flea market located at the Circle Drive-In has been open since the 1970's and is the largest flea market in Northeast Pennsylvania.

shorts.title: Veteran looking to pass the torch to honor late veterans
shorts.title_distilled: Veteran looking to pass the torch to honor late veterans.
shorts.description: SCOTT TOWNSHIP, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A Navy veteran in Lackawanna County is looking for someone to take over his three-decade-long business that honors late veterans. 77-year-old Jim Steier has been making wooden flag cases since 1994. The Navy vet started his business after years of experience in the casket industry. Steier is looking for [...]

The Navy vet started his business after years of experience in the casket industry. Steier is looking for [...]

shorts.title: Running of the Ginger returns to Scranton
shorts.title_distilled: Running of the Ginger returns to Scranton.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA (WBRE/WYOU) — Parade day in Scranton was not only a green colored celebration, but also one featuring reddish orange. A tradition started by some University of Scranton students a few years ago returned, called The Running of the Gingers. Redheads ran up a hill to honor Irish pride. It's become quite a social [...]

shorts.title: Interstate 81 to see lane restrictions through week
shorts.title_distilled: Interstate 81 to see lane restrictions through week.
shorts.description: LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Interstate 81 in Lackawanna County will receive several lane restrictions from the Pennsylvania Department of Transportation (PennDOT) throughout the week. Between Monday, March 16, and Friday, March 20, PennDOT announced Lackawanna County will have several lane restrictions between 7:00 a.m. and 4:00 p.m. for tree trimming. The restrictions will be on [...]
